summary: P1 testing complete: Logout functionality and InvestmentsSection refactoring verified. Backend: All P1 endpoints (logout, investments CRUD, financings CRUD, contributions, pay-installment) working correctly. Frontend: Sidebar 'Sair' button calls backend API and redirects to login page. InvestmentsSection now uses real backend data via DataContext (no mock data). Investment/Financing modals work correctly. Simulador page loads with calculation controls.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render - cosmetic only

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api - returns running status
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout - clears session and deletes cookie
Backend: GET /api/investments - returns investments for user
Backend: POST /api/investments - creates new investment
Backend: PUT /api/investments/{id} - updates investment
Backend: DELETE /api/investments/{id} - deletes investment
Backend: GET /api/investments/contributions/all - returns all contributions
Backend: POST /api/investments/contributions - creates contribution and updates investment valor
Backend: GET /api/financings - returns financings for user
Backend: POST /api/financings - creates new financing
Backend: POST /api/financings/{id}/pay-installment - pays installment and updates parcela_atual
Backend: Financing status changes to 'quitado' when all installments paid
Frontend: Login page loads with Google OAuth button
Frontend: Dashboard loads with user data and 'Nova Transação' button
Frontend: Sidebar 'Sair' logout button visible with data-testid='sidebar-logout-btn'
Frontend: Logout button calls backend API and redirects to login page
Frontend: Investimentos page loads with real backend data (not mock)
Frontend: Investimentos shows Total Investido from backend
Frontend: Investment cards display with Aporte and Historico buttons
Frontend: Financing cards display with progress bar and Pagar Parcela button
Frontend: 'Novo Investimento' button opens investment modal with correct fields
Frontend: 'Financiamento' button opens financing modal with correct fields
Frontend: Simulador page loads with calculation controls (Capital, Aporte, Taxa, Inflacao, Prazo)
Frontend: Simulador shows projection chart and calculated values
Frontend: Dashboard 'Nova Transação' button opens TransactionModal
critical_code_review_comments: InvestmentsSection.jsx successfully refactored from mockData.js to DataContext - no mock imports remain
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test user with investments (Tesouro Selic, Acoes PETR4), financing (Financiamento Apartamento), contributions, categories, and card for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 implementation complete and verified. Logout functionality works - calls POST /api/auth/logout and redirects to login page. InvestmentsSection fully refactored to use DataContext with real backend data. Key data-testid attributes: sidebar-logout-btn, new-investment-btn, new-financing-btn, total-invested, inv-modal-nome, inv-modal-tipo, inv-modal-valor, inv-modal-save, fin-modal-nome, fin-modal-save, aporte-btn-{id}, pay-fin-installment-{id}, sim-capital, sim-aporte, sim-total-aportado, sim-valor-nominal.

business_rules_verified.logout_clears_session: VERIFIED - POST /api/auth/logout deletes session from DB and clears cookie
business_rules_verified.logout_redirects_to_login: VERIFIED - Frontend redirects to / after logout
business_rules_verified.investments_crud: VERIFIED - All CRUD operations work correctly
business_rules_verified.contribution_updates_investment: VERIFIED - Creating aporte increases investment valor
business_rules_verified.financing_pay_installment: VERIFIED - Paying installment increments parcela_atual and valor_pago
business_rules_verified.financing_status_quitado: VERIFIED - Status changes to 'quitado' when all installments paid
